015 */
016package org.consensusj.exchange.knowm;
017
018import org.consensusj.exchange.CurrencyUnitPair;
019import org.consensusj.exchange.ExchangeRateChange;
020import org.consensusj.exchange.ExchangeRateObserver;
021import org.consensusj.exchange.rx.ExchangeRateUpdate;
022import org.javamoney.moneta.convert.ExchangeRateBuilder;
023import org.javamoney.moneta.spi.DefaultNumberValue;
024import org.javamoney.moneta.spi.LazyBoundCurrencyConversion;
025import org.knowm.xchange.Exchange;
026import org.knowm.xchange.ExchangeFactory;
027import org.knowm.xchange.currency.CurrencyPair;
028import org.knowm.xchange.dto.marketdata.Ticker;
029import org.knowm.xchange.service.marketdata.MarketDataService;
030
031import javax.money.CurrencyUnit;
032import javax.money.MonetaryException;
033import javax.money.convert.ConversionContext;
034import javax.money.convert.ConversionQuery;
035import javax.money.convert.CurrencyConversion;
036import javax.money.convert.CurrencyConversionException;
037import javax.money.convert.ExchangeRate;
038import javax.money.convert.ExchangeRateProvider;
039import javax.money.convert.ProviderContext;
040import javax.money.convert.RateType;
041import java.io.IOException;
042import java.util.ArrayList;
043import java.util.Collection;
044import java.util.Date;
045import java.util.HashMap;
046import java.util.List;
047import java.util.Map;
048import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
049import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
050import java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException;
051
052/**
053 *
054 */
055public class KnowmExchangeRateProvider implements ExchangeRateProvider {
056    protected final String exchangeClassName;
057    protected final Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions;
058    protected final Map<CurrencyUnitPair, MonitoredCurrency> monitoredCurrencies = new HashMap<>();
059
060    protected String name;
061    protected ProviderContext providerContext;
062    protected MarketDataService marketDataService;
063
064    private volatile boolean initialized = false;
065    protected Exchange exchange;
066
067    /**
068     * Construct using an XChange Exchange class object for a set of currencies
069     * @param exchangeClassName Classname of XChange exchange we are wrapping
070     * @param pairs pairs to monitor
071     */
072    protected KnowmExchangeRateProvider(String exchangeClassName,
073                                              Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions,
074                                              Collection<CurrencyUnitPair> pairs) {
075        this.exchangeClassName = exchangeClassName;
076        this.tickerSymbolConversions = (tickerSymbolConversions != null) ? tickerSymbolConversions : new HashMap<>();
077        for (CurrencyUnitPair pair : pairs) {
078            KnowmExchangeRateProvider.MonitoredCurrency monitoredCurrency = new KnowmExchangeRateProvider.MonitoredCurrency(pair, xchangePair(pair));
079            monitoredCurrencies.put(pair, monitoredCurrency);
080        }
081    }
082
083
084    public synchronized void initialize()  {
085        if (!initialized) {
086            initialized = true;
087            exchange = ExchangeFactory.INSTANCE.createExchange(exchangeClassName);
088            name = exchange.getExchangeSpecification().getExchangeName();
089            providerContext = ProviderContext.of(name, RateType.DEFERRED);
090            marketDataService = exchange.getMarketDataService();
091        }
092    }
093
094    public ExchangeRateUpdate getUpdate(CurrencyUnitPair pair) {
095        MonitoredCurrency pairMonitor = monitoredCurrencies.get(pair);
096        Ticker ticker;
097        try {
098            ticker = marketDataService.getTicker(pairMonitor.exchangePair);
099        } catch (IOException e) {
100            e.printStackTrace();
101            ticker = null;
102        }
103        return tickerToUpdate(pair, ticker);
104    }
105
106    private ExchangeRateUpdate tickerToUpdate(CurrencyUnitPair pair, Ticker ticker) {
107        return (ticker != null) ?
108                new ExchangeRateUpdate(pair, DefaultNumberValue.of(ticker.getBid()), ticker.getTimestamp().getTime()) :
109                new ExchangeRateUpdate(pair, null, 0);
110    }
111
112    @Override
113    public ProviderContext getContext() {
114        return providerContext;
115    }
116
117    @Override
118    public boolean isAvailable(ConversionQuery conversionQuery) {
119        return getExchangeRate(conversionQuery) != null;
120    }
121
122    @Override
123    public ExchangeRate getExchangeRate(ConversionQuery conversionQuery) {
124        CurrencyUnitPair pair = new CurrencyUnitPair(conversionQuery.getBaseCurrency(), conversionQuery.getCurrency());
125        KnowmExchangeRateProvider.MonitoredCurrency monitoredCurrency = monitoredCurrencies.get(pair);
126        if (monitoredCurrency == null) {
127            throw new CurrencyConversionException(pair.getBase(),
128                    pair.getTarget(),
129                    null,
130                    "Pair not found.");
131        }
132        ExchangeRate rate = null;
133        try {
134            rate = buildExchangeRate(pair, monitoredCurrency.getTicker());
135        } catch (TimeoutException e) {
136            throw new MonetaryException("Timeout loading exchange rate", e);
137        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
138            Thread.currentThread().interrupt(); // Restore interruption flag
139        }
140        return rate;
141    }
142
143    @Override
144    public CurrencyConversion getCurrencyConversion(ConversionQuery conversionQuery) {
145        return new LazyBoundCurrencyConversion(conversionQuery, this, ConversionContext
146                .of(getContext().getProviderName(), getContext().getRateTypes().iterator().next()));
147    }
148
149    @SuppressWarnings("deprecation")
150    protected ExchangeRateChange buildExchangeRateChange(CurrencyUnitPair pair, Ticker ticker) {
151        Date date = ticker.getTimestamp();
152        // Not all exchanges provide a timestamp, default to 0 if it is null
153        long milliseconds = (date != null) ? date.getTime() : 0;
154
155        return new ExchangeRateChange(buildExchangeRate(pair, ticker), milliseconds);
156    }
157
158    private ExchangeRate buildExchangeRate(CurrencyUnitPair pair, Ticker ticker) {
159        return new ExchangeRateBuilder(name, RateType.DEFERRED)
160                .setBase(pair.getBase())
161                .setTerm(pair.getTarget())
162                .setFactor(DefaultNumberValue.of(ticker.getLast()))
163                .build();
164    }
165
166    /**
167     * Map from CurrencyUnitPair to XChange CurrencyPair
168     * tickerSymbolConversions is used to handle cases like ItBit that uses "XBT" instead of "BTC"
169     * @param pair  CurrencyUnitPair using JavaMoney CurrencyUnits
170     * @return  XChange CurrencyPair with exchange-specific symbols if any
171     */
172    protected CurrencyPair xchangePair(CurrencyUnitPair pair) {
173        return new CurrencyPair(convertSymbol(pair.getBase()),
174                convertSymbol(pair.getTarget()));
175    }
176
177    /**
178     * Convert a JavaMoney CurrencyUnit to an XChange currency code string
179     * (This will be exchange-specific (e.g. ItBit uses "XBT" instead of "BTC")
180     * @param currencyUnit A JavaMoney currency unit
181     * @return exchange-specific symbol for the currency
182     */
183    public String convertSymbol(CurrencyUnit currencyUnit) {
184        return tickerSymbolConversions.getOrDefault(currencyUnit, currencyUnit.getCurrencyCode());
185    }
186
187    protected static class MonitoredCurrency {
188        final public CurrencyUnitPair  pair;           // Terminating (target) JavaMoney CurrencyUnit
189        final public CurrencyPair      exchangePair;   // XChange currency pair (format used by XChange/exchange)
190        @SuppressWarnings("deprecation")
191        final public List<ExchangeRateObserver> observerList = new ArrayList<>();
192        private final UpdateableValueLatch<Ticker> tickerLatch = new UpdateableValueLatch<>();
193
194        MonitoredCurrency(CurrencyUnitPair pair, CurrencyPair exchangePair) {
195            this.pair = pair;
196            this.exchangePair = exchangePair;
197        }
198
199        public boolean isTickerAvailable() {
200            return tickerLatch.isSet();
201        }
202
203        /**
204         * Get Ticker from the UpdateableValueLatch
205         * @return ticker object
206         * @throws InterruptedException thread was interrupted by another thread
207         * @throws TimeoutException should only happen if first request times out
208         */
209        public Ticker getTicker() throws InterruptedException, TimeoutException {
210            return tickerLatch.getValue();
211        }
212
213        /**
214         * Set the ticker object, called from polling method
215         * @param ticker ticker object
216         */
217        public void setTicker(Ticker ticker) {
218            tickerLatch.setValue(ticker);
219        }
220    }
221
222    /**
223     * A value latch that will block if value not yet set, but allows
224     * the value to be updated regularly (e.g. when polling for new values)
225     * @param <T>  Type of value to latch
226     */
227    static class UpdateableValueLatch<T> {
228        private volatile T value = null;
229        private final CountDownLatch ready = new CountDownLatch(1);
230        private final long timeoutSeconds;
231
232        UpdateableValueLatch() {
233            this(120);
234        }
235
236        UpdateableValueLatch(long timeoutInSeconds) {
237            this.timeoutSeconds = timeoutInSeconds;
238        }
239
240        T getValue() throws InterruptedException, TimeoutException {
241            // were we called before first poll completed?
242            if (value == null) {
243                // wait for the CountDownLatch
244                boolean loaded = ready.await(timeoutSeconds, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
245                if (!loaded) {
246                    throw new TimeoutException("Timeout before value set");
247                }
248            }
249            return value;
250        }
251
252        /* synchronized ? */ void setValue(T newValue) {
253            value = newValue;
254            ready.countDown();
255        }
256
257        boolean isSet() {
258            return value != null;
259        }
260    }
261}
